name: Spinach Salad with Garlic Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the stems and any damaged or wilted areas from the spinach leaves, and break them into 2-inch pieces (you should have about 8 loose cups).
2. Wash the spinach in a basin of cool water, then lift it from the water, drain, and dry thoroughly, preferably in a salad spinner, so no water remains to dilute the dressing.
3. Place all the dressing ingredients in a bowl large enough to hold the greens, and whisk briefly to mix but not emulsify.
4. Add the greens, and toss well. Serve immediately, since the spinach will tend to wilt quickly after it is mixed with the dressing.
